bugs.error_message: Theme config was not reading from public/admin store-config endpoints
bugs.root_cause: Theme initialization relied on localStorage only, and admin save used fire-and-forget behavior instead of full endpoint-based read/write flow.
bugs.fix: Added public store-config service (`GET /store-config`) for app startup, added admin store-config read (`GET /admin/store-config`), and switched admin save to robust update (`PUT /admin/store-config` with POST fallback).

bugs.error_message: Missing change-password UI for customers and admin user management
bugs.root_cause: Application had no UI flow wired to PUT /users/:userId/password and no admin-side per-user password action.
bugs.fix: Added dedicated Change Password screen for normal users, added admin-only change-password action/modal in customers table, wired authService.changePassword, and added status-specific messages for 400/403/404.
